notes: These scenarios drive the legacy Win16 card database app through WineVDM.
Run smoke-launch first. If dialog focus differs on a machine, tune only this JSON file.
The runner supports command, waitWindow, setText, click, sendKeys, sleep, snapshot, assertAnyFile, and closeApp actions.

fixtures.name: smoke-launch
fixtures.description: Launches the legacy app and captures an empty oracle workspace snapshot.

fixtures.name: plain-minimal-deck
fixtures.description: Creates a default new deck and saves it as a plain legacy .BTN fixture.

steps.comment: Promote the bundled legacy sample deck as the simplest plain golden fixture while common-dialog Save As automation is calibrated.

fixtures.name: calibrate-open-via-fileok
fixtures.description: Calibration fixture: drive OPENDLGPROC through commdlg_FileNameOK instead of mouse/keyboard common-dialog OK.

steps.comment: Set filename before explicitly raising commdlg_FileNameOK for instrumentation.
Read back the old-style common-dialog edit control.
Explicitly post commdlg_FileNameOK to trace the legacy app's OPENFILENAME view.

fixtures.name: password-only-deck
fixtures.description: Creates a deck protected with a legacy owner password but without the data-encryption checkbox.

steps.comment: WineVDM returns the active deck path from Save As; preserve the legacy-written secured deck under the fixture name after closing.

fixtures.name: password-encrypted-deck
fixtures.description: Creates a deck protected with a legacy owner password and the data-encryption checkbox.

steps.comment: WineVDM returns the active deck path from Save As; preserve the legacy-written secured deck under the fixture name after closing.

fixtures.name: export-dbase-deck
fixtures.description: Exports the bundled Software Library deck through File > Save Deck As... to the dBaseIII+/PC-File interchange format.

steps.comment: Use Window > Close All to clear decks auto-restored by the legacy app before opening the fixture source deck.
Add All fields to the export order.

fixtures.name: export-cardfile-deck
fixtures.description: Exports the bundled Software Library deck through File > Save Deck As... to the Microsoft Cardfile interchange format.

steps.comment: Use Window > Close All to clear decks auto-restored by the legacy app before opening the fixture source deck.

fixtures.name: export-wordperfect-deck
fixtures.description: Exports the bundled Software Library deck through File > Save Deck As... to the WordPerfect 5.1 merge interchange format.

steps.comment: Use Window > Close All to clear decks auto-restored by the legacy app before opening the fixture source deck.

fixtures.name: export-takenote-deck
fixtures.description: Attempts the legacy TakeNote .TN Save Deck As path so the fixture can prove whether the legacy app emits a distinct .TN file or aliases it to a compatible deck/template route.

steps.comment: Use Window > Close All to clear decks auto-restored by the legacy app before opening the fixture source deck.

fixtures.name: calibrate-notes-heavy
fixtures.description: Calibration placeholder for the notes-heavy/redefine workflow. Use -Fixture calibrate-notes-heavy -Interactive and record stable dialog/control steps back into this JSON.

fixtures.name: calibrate-many-fields
fixtures.description: Calibration placeholder for a near/max-field deck. Use -Fixture calibrate-many-fields -Interactive and record File > Redefine field-grid steps here.

fixtures.name: calibrate-max-field-lengths
fixtures.description: Calibration placeholder for max-length text, truncation, empty field, and multiline notes boundaries.

fixtures.name: calibrate-reports-sidecars
fixtures.description: Calibration placeholder for deck plus same-basename .RPT sidecar report definitions.

fixtures.name: calibrate-security-cycle
fixtures.description: Calibration placeholder for add-password, remove-password, and re-open-without-password behavior.

fixtures.name: password-takenote-deck
fixtures.description: Creates a TakeNote-compatible .TN Save As fixture after applying a legacy owner password to prove whether .TN preserves native security metadata.

steps.comment: Clear decks auto-restored by the legacy app.
